legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity bootstrap, the non-existent 'Direction Line' style, RTE-toolbar, math render, file pickers, Preview/Reader/Publish, persistence, responsiveness, or accessibility flows.
